chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Good Deeds

text: 1682 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «كُلُّ مَعْرُوفٍ صَدَقَةٌ وَ اَلدَّالُّ عَلَى اَلْخَيْرِ كَفَاعِلِهِ وَ اَللَّهُ يُحِبُّ إِغَاثَةَ اَللَّهْفَانِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1682 - Imam (as) said:
"Every act of kindness is charity, and the one who guides towards goodness is like the one who performs it. Allah (swt) loves the relief of the distressed."
